title: Suspected Ebola case triggers health alert in Bengaluru
content: Bengaluru District Surgeon and Medical Superintendent of the hospital, Anil Kumar Banagar, said the woman, suspected to have developed symptoms, had recently travelled from Uganda to Ahmedabad and had later arrived in Bengaluru

title: Andhra Pradesh emerges as a pioneer in AI-driven healthcare innovations, says Minister
content: Satya Kumar Yadav promotes AI-driven diagnostic tests, says that these not only provide accurate results but also improve the speed of delivery of healthcare services and make tests affordable for people

title: CBSE refutes claim that its marking portal was compromised
content: The Board’s statement comes as an ethical hacker claims he had exposed the vulnerabilities of the portal and complained to CERT-In in February

title: Fuel shortage hits pumps amid panic buying; OMCs call for calm, say supply is steady
content: Petrol pump owners report dwindling supplies and long queues as demand peaks due to farming activity; some impose curbs on sale fearing supply disruption; OMCs assure public of “normal operations with steady fuel availability”, advise against hoarding

title: Fast-track court frames charges against seven accused in Zubeen Garg death case
content: Four accused of murder based on SIT chargesheet; Garg died while swimming in Singapore in 2025; Assam CM claims he was murdered as part of a conspiracy; Singapore coroner ruled it an accidental drowning

title: Twisha Sharma death: Madhya Pradesh DGP defends Bhopal Police as CBI takes over case, launches probe
content: Kailash Makwana’s statement comes amid several allegations made by Twisha Sharma’s family such as institutional bias and procedural lapses by local police

title: India-U.S. and Quad frameworks on critical minerals take shape amid Chinese curbs
content: Agreement built upon continued engagements between two countries, including India becoming a signatory to the U.S.-led Pax Silica initiative on February 20, 2026.

title: Extreme heatwave hits A.P. as Vijayawada north soars to 47.3°C
content: The city felt like a furnace at 7 p.m. as well as the temperatures stood at 40°C, according to real-time weather information available on the Directorate of Economics and Statistics

title: Delhi High Court notice to Swati Chaturvedi on OpIndia’s plea against trial court order
content: The court said the material filed by OpIndia ‘prima facie nowhere shows’ that Chaturvedi was involved in ‘running extortion rackets’ as alleged

title: Andhra Pradesh launches initiative to clear water hyacinth and revive water bodies
content: MA&UD Principal Secretary says the unchecked growth of the weed has obstructed irrigation channels, degraded water quality, and disrupted aquatic ecosystems, posing challenges to agriculture and public health

title: Six killed and 21 injured as bus overturns on Lucknow-Agra Expressway
content: Eyewitness accounts indicate that the bus was traveling at a high speed when it collided with the divider and overturned

title: Quad FMs announce maritime, energy initiatives amidst Hormuz chokehold, tense South China Sea
content: FMs pledge collaboration on energy security, maritime surveillance, domain awareness; Quad joint statement calls for freedom of navigation, adherence to international law in Hormuz, Red Sea, South China Sea

title: Supreme Court to examine if law is diluting India’s wetland count
content: The Convention expressly included both natural and artificial wetlands, whether permanent or temporary, without distinction, senior advocate Gopal Sankaranarayanan and advocate Anindita Mitra submitted for the petitioners

title: CNG prices hiked for fourth time in eleven days in Delhi, North India; latest by ₹2/kg
content: Since the first hike on May 15, CNG prices in Delhi and across several cities of Uttar Pradesh, Haryana and Rajasthan, have cumulatively increased by ₹6 per kg

title: Mundamveli residents lay day-long siege to GCDA office
content: Residents raise fresh concerns over the alleged violation of mandatory distance norms separating the 110 kV EHT line passing through their neighbourhood from the twin towers. They allege that the construction has put lives and properties at risk

title: One dead, two hurt in Assam police encounters
content: A man accused in an April 24 armed robbery in Nagaon district was killed, while two ULFA-linked extortion operators in Sivasagar district received gunshot wounds

title: Traders oppose move to install Nehru statue at APMC Yard in Kalaburagi
content: The Gunj Market area witnesses a bandh as traders shut down business establishments and suspend commercial activities in protest

title: SC asks Uttar Pradesh, panel to frame development plan for Vrindavan's Banke Bihari temple
content: A Bench headed by Chief Justice of India says the State should “come forward” for the development of “secular infrastructure facilities” in and around the temple complex

title: Kerala Waqf Board says it was ‘forced’ to upload Munambam data after Farook College’s stand
content: However, those in college managing committee has defended the decision not to post the data, stating that Munambam was not a Waqf property and therefore the information was not uploaded on UMEED portal

title: No clarity on next Quad leaders summit, sparking questions about the group’s future
content: As officials struggle to pin down the schedules of Mr. Trump, Mr. Modi, Ms. Takaichi, and Mr. Albanese, there is speculation that the Quad will be downgraded to an FM-level meet or occur on the sidelines of other gatherings

title: Watch: India, U.S. strike Critical Minerals deal amid China concerns | Above the Fold | 26.05.2026
content: From the QUAD meeting in New Delhi and India-U.S. critical minerals deal to fresh AIADMK defections to the TVK and rising CNG prices - here are the top stories of the day.

title: Poultry farmers advised heatwave strategies amid rising chicken mortality
content: Farmers are advised to supply fresh water and feed to chicks, sprinkle water to decrease heat and follow scientific methods to dispose the dead birds to prevent diseases, says Animal Husbandry officials

title: Kerala Chief Minister misleading people in Munambam issue, alleges CPI(M)
content: Chief Minister, who had earlier offered to resolve the issue in 10 minutes, should explore the possibilities for solving it rather than complicating it. The government should attempt to find a lasting solution to the issue through legal means, says CPI(M) Ernakulam district secretariat

title: "Look Beyond Karnataka": Inside Track Of Rahul Gandhi-Siddaramaiah Meeting
content: At the 35-minute meeting, Rahul Gandhi reportedly told Siddaramaiah that any decision must now be made with the 2028 assembly election and the 2029 Lok Sabha election in mind.

title: Delhi CNG Prices Have Jumped Rs 6 In 11 Days. Here's Why
content: With the latest hike, CNG prices in Delhi have risen from Rs 77.09 per kg before May 15 to Rs 83.09 per kg on May 26.

title: Pak May Need New Passports If It Accepts Trump's Abraham Accords Proposal
content: Pakistan said it was "under no compulsion" to accept such demands and reiterated that recognition of Israel remains tied to the creation of a sovereign Palestinian state.

title: Exclusive: Israeli Defence Official On Hamas Threat, Civilian Deaths In Gaza
content: In an exclusive interview with NDTV, Ben Cohen said Israeli forces are currently dealing with threats from Gaza, Lebanon and Iran-backed groups operating across the region.

title: 'Not Rarest Of Rare Case': Delhi Court Denies Death Penalty To Child Rape Convict
content: A Delhi court refused to award the death penalty to a man convicted of raping a four-year-old girl, saying the incident did not fall under the "rarest of rare" category.

title: 6 Months Into Marriage, Lucknow Woman Found Dead After Dowry Harassment
content: Her family has alleged that she faced repeated demands for dowry, including pressure for a four-wheeler, and that her in-laws murdered her before staging the scene to look like suicide.

title: Delhi Cracks Down On Illegal Animal Sacrifice Ahead Of Bakrid
content: Ahead of Bakrid, the Delhi government has deployed Rapid Response Teams across all 13 districts to crack down on illegal animal sacrifice, unauthorised livestock trade and violations of festival guidelines in the capital.

title: Gujarat Sends Vets, Multiple Teams To Gir Amid Sudden Lion Deaths
content: Wildlife activists explain that the disease primarily spreads via "ticks" hosted by domestic cattle like cows and buffaloes, which migrate to the pride when lions scavenge on dead livestock or venture near forest borders.

title: We'll Have Fewer Doctors, Scientists: US Tech Founders On New Green Card Rule
content: Reid Hoffman, the co-founder of LinkedIn, questioned the move, saying, "Does this mean AI Researchers, employees, and students will now have to leave the country and wait through a backlog process to continue their work?"

title: 'I Disliked Her': Man 'Sells' Wife, She Gets Gang-Raped In Gujarat Shocker
content: The mastermind behind the entire operation was revealed to be the victim's husband, Nikesh Patel, who allegedly chose to trade his wife's freedom and dignity for a mere fifty thousand rupees because he simply did not like her.

title: As Heatwave Grips India Again, Data Shows Who Is Most At Risk
content: Heatwave to severe heatwave conditions are currently prevailing across large parts of central and northwest India, with temperatures touching 47 degrees Celsius in some areas.

title: Raped, Screamed At, Starved: Abuse Scandal Rocks Over 100 French Schools
content: Paris prosecutors are now investigating more than 100 cases of alleged abuse, including rape, carried out by school supervisors on children as young as three.

title: Video: Tourists Crowd Sikkim Hills, Traffic Chaos At Zero Point
content: Escaping the heat of the plains, tourists are flocking to the hills, with a viral video from Zero Point in North Sikkim showing a long traffic jam of vehicles heading to the destination through Yumthang's Valley of Flowers.

title: US Plans To Give Fewer Bombers, Warships To NATO During Crisis: Report
content: The NATO alliance is under unprecedented strain, with some European countries concerned that Washington may withdraw outright.

title: 5.56 Crore Consumers Took No Or Only One LPG Refill In 2025-26: RTI
content: The data shows that across Indian Oil Corporation Ltd, Bharat Petroleum Corporation Ltd and Hindustan Petroleum Corporation Ltd, 3.30 crore consumers did not book even a single cylinder refill

title: Why Trump's Push For Muslim Nations To Join Abraham Accords Is Unrealistic
content: Trump's surprise demand on Monday came at the height of the latest negotiations with Tehran and hours before an American strike on southern Iran piled pressure on a fragile ceasefire.

title: Months Of Wait, 6-Hour Meet, Presser: Unpacking The Karnataka Power Game
content: Congress's KC Venugopal, flanked by Karnataka Chief Minister Siddaramaiah and DK Shivakumar, took centrestage.

title: No Chief Minister Change In Karnataka, Congress Reveals Delhi Meet Agenda
content: Siddaramaiah, DK Shivakumar - "Speculation, No Reality": Congress Plays Down Karnataka Power Shift Buzz

title: On CCTV, Woman From Gujarat Shot Dead At US Supermarket
content: The woman, who had been working at that general store in Virginia for the last 10 years, has been identified as Meghnaben Patel. She was 45.

title: 'No security breaches': CBSE rubbishes OSM portal hacking claim amid answer sheet mix-up row
content: CBSE has refuted claims of a security breach in its On-Screen Marking system, stating the compromised portal was a mere testing site with sample data. This clarification follows a student's allegations of "critical vulnerabilities." Separately, the board acknowledged a technical glitch in a student's answer sheet mix-up, which has since been rectified.

title: Petrol pain: How fuel price hike complicates RBI’s inflation fight
content: Every Re 1 hike in petrol, diesel, CNG, and LPG costs feeds into inflationary pressures in the economy, and also indirectly impacts discretionary spending, hence hitting growth channels.

title: RS seat, Delhi role: Congress 'negotiates' with Sidda to make way for DKS in Karnataka
content: Karnataka's leadership tussle between CM Siddaramaiah and Deputy CM DK Shivakumar persists despite high command meetings. Discussions focused on Rajya Sabha and Council elections, with no official confirmation of leadership change talks. Shivakumar's camp reportedly pushes for a power-sharing formula, which Siddaramaiah has not accepted.

title: CEO Mark Zuckerberg's goodbye memo to 8,000 fired Meta staff has 2 promises for survivors
content: Mark Zuckerberg's goodbye memo to 8,000 fired Meta employees on May 20 doubled as a message to the 70,000 staff still standing. The Meta CEO made two promises: no further company-wide layoffs in 2026, and better communication after weeks of internal anxiety. The memo lands as Meta funnels $125-145 billion into AI infrastructure, shifts 7,000 staff to AI projects, and cancels 6,000 open roles.

title: TN political crisis: Rebel AIADMK MLA backs EPS, submits apology letter
content: AIADMK faces internal turmoil as Hosur MLA P Balakrishna Reddy backs Edappadi K Palaniswami, signaling a potential truce. This follows multiple rebel MLAs submitting apology letters to avoid disqualification after voting against party lines. The party's strength in the Assembly has dwindled due to recent resignations, intensifying a 'horse-trading' row.

title: 'Don 3' fallout: Can a film union 'ban' Ranveer Singh from working?
content: The Federation of Western India Cine Employees (FWICE) has issued a non-cooperation directive against Ranveer Singh over his exit from Don 3.  Legal experts question the directive's binding nature, stating it's an internal measure, not legally enforceable. Ranveer's team argues FWICE lacks jurisdiction over this civil dispute, and he can challenge the ban in court.

title: US Immigration authority issues clarification for H-1B visa holders
content: USCIS has clarified a new Green Card policy. This policy could have required many to apply from abroad. However, USCIS now states that applicants with national interest or economic benefit may continue their current process. This offers relief to many H-1B visa holders and tech industry workers. The agency is reasserting its interpretation of immigration law.

title: Jeff Bezos to Amazon users: 'We can’t run Amazon the way NYC runs its school system'
content: Amazon founder Jeff Bezos has sharply criticized New York City's public school spending, likening its inefficiencies to a poorly run business. He argued that substantial funds aren't reaching teachers, despite high per-student costs. Bezos also dismissed 'tax-the-rich' policies, advocating for identifying and solving root causes of economic struggles instead.

title: AI vs UPSC—three chatbots attempt India’s toughest exam
content: A comparative test of leading AI models on actual UPSC Prelims papers reveal how closely modern systems can mirror human-level preparation, handling history and polity well but struggling with precise current affairs and technical distinctions that often decide exam outcomes.

title: Emma Raducanu net worth 2026: Earnings, endorsements and investments
content: British tennis player Emma Raducanu continues to remain one of the biggest names in women’s tennis in 2026. The former US Open champion has built a huge fortune through prize money, sponsorships, and business ventures. Her performances on the court have been inconsistent in recent years. However, her popularity around the world remains very strong.

title: Amanda Nunes and Nina Nunes’ 2026 net worth and lifestyle
content: MMA power couple Amanda and Nina Nunes boast an estimated combined net worth of $5-7 million by 2026. Amanda's historic dual-division championship reign and lucrative UFC career, coupled with Nina's steady run and coaching, fueled their financial success.  Their investments and private lifestyle underscore a remarkable journey from combat sports to respected family life.

title: Manny Fernández cause of death: Dolphins Super Bowl champion dies at 79
content: Manny Fernández, former Miami Dolphins defensive star and member of the undefeated 1972 Super Bowl team, has died at 79. The Dolphins confirmed the news Monday but did not announce a cause of death. Fernández spent his entire NFL career in Miami and helped the franchise win back to back Super Bowls while becoming one of the team’s most respected defensive players.

title: Stray dog spotted inside Hyderabad airport lounge, video goes viral; RGIA responds
content: A stray dog's presence in Rajiv Gandhi International Airport's passenger lounge has sparked outrage and safety concerns. Airport authorities are collaborating with GHMC for dog control and have reinforced waste management protocols.  Preventive measures are being implemented to avoid future occurrences, though the entry point remains unaddressed.

title: Revisiting Kargil: The story of how the IAF thrashed Pakistan in Operation Safed Sagar
content: In summer 1999, the Indian Air Force launched Operation Safed Sagar, a critical air-to-ground campaign to dislodge Pakistani intruders from Kargil heights. Facing unprecedented high-altitude challenges and early setbacks, the IAF rapidly adapted. By integrating advanced targeting systems like the Litening pod, they achieved precision strikes, notably at Tiger Hill, turning the tide and showcasing air power's decisive role.

title: Passengers evacuated using slides at BLR after smoke on taxiing IndiGo aircraft
content: An IndiGo flight from Bengaluru to Chennai experienced a smoke scare while taxiing, prompting an emergency evacuation of passengers via slides. The Directorate General of Civil Aviation (DGCA) is investigating the incident, which marks the second such evacuation for IndiGo this month. All passengers and crew were reported safe.

title: RCB create massive record, register highest total in IPL playoffs history
content: Royal Challengers Bengaluru achieved a record-breaking score of 254/5 against Gujarat Titans in IPL Qualifier 1. This marks the highest total ever in IPL playoff history. Rajat Patidar led the charge with an unbeaten 93 off 33 balls. Virat Kohli and Krunal Pandya also contributed significantly to the massive total.

title: 9 sixes, 1 dot ball, 281.82 SR: RCB captain Patidar produces all-time IPL playoff masterclass
content: Rajat Patidar unleashed a destructive 93 off 33 balls, including nine sixes, to power Royal Challengers Bengaluru to a massive 254/5 against Gujarat Titans in Qualifier 1.  Dropped twice in the 14th over, Patidar turned anger into a breathtaking knock, leading RCB's late surge and ensuring a historic playoff batting performance.

title: Why Trump's Abraham Accords push may be doomed to fail - explained
content: US President Donald Trump is pushing several Muslim nations, including Saudi Arabia and Pakistan, to join the Abraham Accords and recognize Israel as part of a potential Iran deal. Experts, however, deem the plan unrealistic, citing the Gaza war's impact on Arab public opinion and the persistent demand for Palestinian statehood. Pakistan has already publicly rejected the proposal.

title: The new middle-class dilemma: You earn well, so why does life still feel expensive?
content: Young Indian professionals earn more than ever, yet face rising costs, unaffordable housing, and job insecurity due to AI. This new middle class grapples with maintaining a curated online image while managing internal anxieties about financial stability and professional relevance in a rapidly evolving economy.

title: 'Speechless' Anushka Sharma's reaction goes viral after Virat Kohli wicket vs GT
content: Virat Kohli's explosive 43 off 25 balls against Gujarat Titans in IPL 2026 Qualifier 1 was cut short by Jason Holder. Despite the dismissal, Kohli achieved a historic milestone, becoming the first player to score 600+ runs in four consecutive IPL seasons. His knock, though ending prematurely, showcased his formidable form.

title: Usman Nurmagomedov vs Archie Colgan: Ditcheva returns at PFL event
content: PFL will return to New York on July 31 with a major card at UBS Arena. Usman Nurmagomedov defends his lightweight title against Archie Colgan in the main event, while Dakota Ditcheva faces Denise Kielholtz in the co-main event. PFL CEO John Martin called it one of the promotion’s strongest lineups as the company continues its busy summer championship schedule.

title: Syria finds remnants of Assad-era chemical weapons programme, 18 suspects held
content: Syria's new leadership has unearthed remnants of Bashar al-Assad's secret chemical weapons program, including materials and munitions linked to past deadly attacks. Authorities have detained 18 suspects, reportedly senior officials involved in the network. This discovery highlights ongoing international concerns about hidden stockpiles following the regime's collapse and the country's transition.

title: Newlywed found hanging in Lucknow; family alleges torture over dowry, car demand
content: A 28-year-old newlywed woman was found dead at her in-laws' home in Lucknow, six months after her marriage. Her family alleges dowry harassment and demands for a car led to her death. Police have detained the husband and father-in-law for questioning as an investigation into suicide or dowry-related violence is underway.

title: Shubman Gill loses cool as GT's costly blunders hand Rajat Patidar two lifelines
content: Shubman Gill expressed visible frustration as Rajat Patidar received two crucial lifelines in the IPL 2026 Qualifier 1.  Dropped by Jos Buttler and Jason Holder, then Kagiso Rabada, Patidar capitalized on the errors, going on to score a blistering half-century off just 21 balls.

title: Happy Eid-ul-Adha 2026: 50 Eid Mubarak wishes to share on Bakrid
content: Navigating the flurry of Eid-ul-Adha greetings can be overwhelming. This guide offers 50 ready-to-use messages, from heartfelt family wishes and foodie friend prompts to professional greetings and quick replies.

title: Old Gods vs New Ones: Why Pope Leo is warning against AI
content: ​In his first encyclical, titled Magnifica Humanitas, or Magnificent Humanity, the Pope warns of the dangers of Artificial Intelligence, comparing it to the Tower of Babel and stating: “Humanity, created by God in all its grandeur, is today facing a pivotal choice: either to construct a new Tower of Babel or to build the city in which God and humanity dwell together.”

title: Kagiso Rabada breaks Shami record, creates IPL history to become ...
content: Kagiso Rabada has set a new IPL record for the most wickets in the Powerplay in a single season, surpassing Mohammed Shami's previous record. This achievement came during Gujarat Titans' Qualifier 1 match against Royal Challengers Bengaluru. The winner of this high-stakes encounter will advance directly to the IPL final.

title: ‘These old people in RWAs...’: Techie warns young couples against living in high-rise societies
content: A software engineer's viral social media post criticizing large gated communities sparked a debate on resident welfare associations (RWAs) and housing society rules. He argued that elderly RWA members often become overbearing, imposing unreasonable rules on younger residents. His experience with a security lapse and subsequent reprimand highlighted concerns about RWA control and resident welfare.

title: Too hot to think: How heatwaves are affecting children’s health and learning
content: India grapples with severe heatwaves, impacting children's health and education. Experts highlight children's vulnerability to heat, urging parents and schools to adopt protective measures. From adjusting school timings to ensuring hydration and access to cool spaces, proactive steps are crucial to safeguard childhood amidst rising temperatures and prevent long-term consequences.

title: ‘Governor’ trailer out: Manoj Bajpayee unveils the story of the brave hero who saved India from bankruptcy
content: The trailer of ‘Governor’, starring Manoj Bajpayee, revisits India’s 1990 economic crisis and the unsung hero who helped save the nation from bankruptcy. Directed by Chinmay Mandlekar and produced by Vipul Amrutlal Shah, the film releases on 12 June 2026.

title: Salt misses out for RCB; Shubman makes big change as GT opt to field
content: Gujarat Titans will bowl first against Royal Challengers Bengaluru in IPL 2026 Qualifier 1. The winner directly enters the final. Gujarat Titans made one change to their team. Royal Challengers Bengaluru also made changes for the knockout clash. Both teams aim for a strong performance to secure a spot in the final.

title: No Krishna Nagar in Lahore? Pak pauses heritage renaming plan after outrage by extremists
content: Pakistan's Punjab government has reportedly backtracked on restoring pre-Partition Hindu and Sikh-era street names in Lahore. Following criticism from extremist groups and social media, the administration has deferred the decision. The Lahore Heritage Areas Revival committee had previously approved the proposal, aiming to preserve the city's historical identity.

title: Sanjay Gupta slams FWICE's ban on Ranveer Singh, 'What sense does it even make?'
content: Filmmaker Sanjay Gupta publicly questioned FWICE's decision to ban Ranveer Singh over his 'Don 3' exit, arguing the ban ultimately deprives 300 workers of their livelihood. FWICE issued the directive after Farhan Akhtar claimed Ranveer's sudden departure caused losses of Rs 45 crore during the film's pre-production stage.

title: 'India has so much talent': Ex-Pak coach exposes why Pakistan are falling behind
content: Former Pakistan Test batter Haroon Rasheed highlighted India's success due to long-term planning and a strong domestic system. He contrasted this with Pakistan's struggles stemming from inconsistency, frequent leadership changes, and an outdated domestic structure, warning of further decline if reforms aren't implemented.

title: Europe sizzles under record May heatwave; 7 die in France
content: Western Europe is grappling with an unprecedented May heatwave, with record-breaking temperatures causing fatalities in France and prompting widespread warnings. A "heat dome" has pushed temperatures significantly above average, with France and Britain experiencing their hottest May days ever recorded. Experts link these extreme conditions to climate change, warning of a "new norm."

title: Gujarat woman shot dead in US store; chilling CCTV footage emerges
content: A 47-year-old Gujarati woman, Meghna Patel, was fatally shot by a masked assailant inside a Virginia store. The incident, captured on CCTV, shows the attacker firing multiple shots at close range before fleeing. Patel, who had lived in the US for ten years, succumbed to her injuries, leaving her native village in Gujarat in shock.

title: Suryakumar Yadav likely to play against Uganda in Mumbai
content: Uganda are currently touring Mumbai for four one-day matches and four T20 games. The T20 matches are being played against four separate teams from the T20 Mumbai League, which begins on June 1.

title: Diarrhoea and constipation at the same time? Doc explains
content: Confusing bowel changes, like watery diarrhoea following days of constipation, could signal a serious health issue, warns top gastroenterologist. This 'overflow diarrhoea' occurs when hard stool blocks the colon, allowing only water to pass. Persistent symptoms, especially with abdominal pain or weight loss, require immediate medical evaluation, as colon cancer can also present this way.

title: Trump, nearing 80, continues war on aging, sleep, and other enemies
content: american president Donald Trump turns 80 next month . he has spent years presenting himself as less an aging president than a human monument to stamina, fast food, and pure willpower . now, amid a war on Iran, global economic stress, and growing scrutiny about his age, he headed out to a presidential repair shop .

title: Amid UK's record-breaking Celsius swelter, heat on Tories to reverse AC ban
content: the record-breaking may heatwave has raised political temperatures too . the conservatives pledge to reverse net-zero building regulations banning air-conditioning in new homes . tories say they will overturn Jenrick's regulations politely . he has defected to reform UK .
